top_signals.title: House prices rise as mortgage rates ease from Iran war highs
top_signals.summary: House prices inched up in June as mortgage rates softened following a sharp spike in response to the Iran war.  The average UK property price rose by 0.2 per cent in June to £299,330, compared to a 0.2 per cent fall in May, according to the Lloyds house price index. Inflationary fears and expectation of [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Google backs nuclear fusion startup targeting Europe’s first commercial power plant
top_signals.summary: Proxima Fusion has raised $468 million as it looks to move towards commercializing the promising but infamously difficult technical challenge of nuclear fusion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mubadala Opens Credit Business to Outsiders
top_signals.summary: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Investment Co. is opening up one of its largest investment businesses to outside investors for the first time, Dinesh Nair reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Temasek-Backed Gym Chain Cult.Fit Files Paperwork for India IPO
top_signals.summary: Cult.Fit Ltd. has filed draft paperwork to raise about $100 million in an initial public offering, a rare debut for a gym operator in the world’s most populous country.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Vietnam arrests suspects behind HiAnime anime piracy service
top_signals.summary: ​Vietnamese authorities have arrested and are prosecuting seven suspects believed to have run HiAnime, the largest anime piracy streaming service before its shutdown in June. [...]
